ksa_text: Manage operational budgets and financial resources for data and AI programs, including cost forecasting, expenditure tracking, variance analysis, financial reporting, and cost optimization recommendations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-009 (Operational Excellence) scores 0.423 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Reliability Engineer: in_scope. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Operational Excellence is primary for Data Reliability Engineer. Score 0.423. Market evidence strongly supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld. Operational Excellence is core for Data Reliability Engineer. Market evidence supports inclusion.

decision_rationale: Operational Excellence (primary) for Data Reliability Engineer. Score 0.423. Market evidence supports inclusion as a discrete competency.
